title: TechTalk Series - Tech M&A in Canada
content:
## TechTalk Series - Tech M&A in Canada
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s National Technology Industry Group for an informative four-part webinar series where expert speakers will provide key insights on best practices and emerging issues in the tech world.
Wednesday, September 18, 2024
Tech M&A in Canada: How the Cap Table Drives the Deal
- Robert Anton , Partner, Business Law Group, McCarthy Tétrault
- Heidi Gordon , Partner, Business Law Group, McCarthy Tétrault
Note : All instructions and information on how to access the webinars will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
If you have questions about this series, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
